name: Providence House Men's Center
classificationReason: Men's Center in name suggests men's health; likely offers TRT

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2__zixm7JlMRwg4RWBCWyBQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21FMmJVUkVPRUZOV25BemNtRjRPRTFwTWxsSGNYYxAB
reviews.text: I will forever be grateful for God guiding me to Providence House! I came to the women's facility in November 2024 and completed the program in November 2025. I have been an alcoholic/addict for over half of my life, and the staff here helped fill that void with love, compasssion, and support while I learned to heal safely and love myself again. I was so broken, lost, and completely desperate when I walked through those doors, and read the sign "This is it, this must be the place",  all I had to do was just stay, and staying has been the best decision of my life! By working the 12 step program that they offer, and trusting in a higher power, I have found a purpose in life, bigger than I ever imagined! I "Get To" help other women now on their own journey through recovery, and help love them the same way that I needed when I walked through the doors! God truly is a way maker, and he is working miracles through all of you here! Thank you from the bottom of my heart! 💜

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2__zixm7JlMRwg4RWBCWyBQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25SVlVrWndVakZPTUdscFRtZHVhR2hYYjJsc1ozYxAB
reviews.text: This place has changed my life. Before coming into providence I was really hopeless, I thought I was going to live a life in addition forever. I love the program they run. The staff here loves you till u start to love yourself. I’m grateful for this place, I honestly don’t think I could ever pay them back for what they have done for me in my life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2__zixm7JlMRwg4RWBCWyBQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toamJWcFRhRGwzYzBWaWJVd3lURVl6VURWS2FVRRAB
reviews.text:
So grateful for PH as a whole ❤️ while I got to work on myself I was also able to bring along my 2 daughters ☺️ for that I’ll forever be thankful ✨
The staff & counselors are amazing 🤞🏽

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2__zixm7JlMRwg4RWBCWyBQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21ScVNHZFRNblJwVjNwcGNtcFFSamx1YW1wVE5HYxAB
reviews.text:
Providence House gave me the foundation I needed to build a strong support system and live clean. From day one, I felt seen, supported, and never judged. The staff genuinely cares, and their guidance helped me rediscover purpose and strength I thought I had lost.

Recovery isn’t easy, but this place made it possible. Beyond just helping me stay clean, they gave me real opportunities to grow and fulfill my life in ways I never imagined. I’m incredibly grateful for everything they’ve done for me — I wouldn’t be where I am today without them.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2__zixm7JlMRwg4RWBCWyBQ/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJLWl1dS1BbFozckhREAE
reviews.text: 💜 I fought drug addiction for 5-6 years with my drug/drugs of choice being meth and fentanyl. Providence House has saved me 3 times and each time I went back they were nothing short of wanting to help me in ways that didn’t work the last time. After my 3rd time being there and myself actually taking the program seriously and willing to do anything to not go back to my old life style I am now 18 months Clean and Sober from all mind altering substances. 🤯 I have made some the most amazing relationships with everyone, from the support staff to the counselors and owners. They are like a family I never had, my second family and I can count on them for anything but what even more cool is they can count on me because of the person I am today due to all of their help. I’m blessed to be where I’m at in life!

reviews.name: places/ChIJSwCMndUjJlMRK2FAvOYm_uA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xwc1NtSkphRzU0ZWxsNVpUVkJhRWxtTFRadFYyYxAB
reviews.text: If you’re looking at reviews to a hormone clinic let me tell you that hormone replacement therapy exists for a reason. You owe it to yourself to look, feel, and be your best. This is a game changer folks. At Rut you will kind professional service. You can talk to Natasha about anything and she’ll get you where you want to be.

reviews.name: places/ChIJSwCMndUjJlMRK2FAvOYm_uA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210NFFqWk9RbWRMV25ac2VITkNXVTFwVURWdVJtYxAB
reviews.text: Natasha is intelligent, patient, and has an excellent understanding of hormones, peptides, vitamins , minerals and other supplements. If there is a coumpound she is unfamiliar with, she will tell you what she does know and indicates she will do further research. My initial consultation was simple, straightforward, and comfortable. The bloodwork results were explained well to me. I highly recommend Natasha for anyone looking to proactively monitor and improve their health. Both my wife and I had a great experience.

reviews.name: places/ChIJSwCMndUjJlMRK2FAvOYm_uA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t3eFgwc3RaR1Y1ZFhKVGJHZEdTMFZaY1ROa2RVRRAB

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3Wn6c2rNyFIR-2Pgi6QHCgI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tkcU9WQlVNREpuTTJJMWVVRmlkek5zTW5reWRrRRAB
reviews.text:
0 stars, DO NOT RECOMMEND! A testosterone clinic for men, run entirely by women, so weird. Came in fully ready to sign up, I knew what was going to be expected, im not new to testosterone, I think i knew more about testosterone then the nurse practitioner, who by the way, was absolutely negative the whole visit. Actually told me I might need to be referred to an endocrinologist, before even taking my blood. My blood work came back good actually, my test levels were on the very low end but thats to be expected. So if you want to spend 200/month to have a woman inject you with a 1.5 inch needle, only once a week, (Even though daily, at the very least twice a week injections have been shown to be way more beneficial,  with far less side effects) then this is your place. Oh and to charge 200/month, when a 10ml multi-use vial of testosterone is $40, is wild.

After my awkward visit, I still chose to purchase a libido boost she sold to me for $150, pt-141/oxytocin,  and I have yet to receive it. My visit was almost a month ago now. If youre still reading this, please go look else where to get your testosterone,  alot of telemedicine companies online will offer you the same product with much less hassle.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3Wn6c2rNyFIR-2Pgi6QHCgI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21oSlRrUXRZbFZrVFhJNVUycDZXalIxUWxWTFkyYxAB
reviews.text:
I always had a pleasant interaction with the staff at the Fargo clinic. However, I had to discontinue treatment. Almost 18 months later I am being charged for treatment once again.

I would not have left a negative review if this had happened a month or two after I discontinued treatment. However this is unacceptable and reeks of dishonest trade practices.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3Wn6c2rNyFIR-2Pgi6QHCgI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2psV01UTllRazF6ZGt3eVZVTnRTV0ZVVjA0NVZYYxAB
reviews.text: This place is a scam! They only want your money. I did not see any increase in energy. I was still tired after a year on TRT therapy and I was still in a brain fog. They started off charging me $150/month, but when I complained because one of the providers accused me of not following my plan, they increased my monthly payment to $199/month. They also increased my payment to $199/month because they were not sending me the blunt draw needles that I needed in order to draw the testosterone and I had to use the small blue injection needles in order to draw the testosterone which took much longer and was not as accurate. When I complained to Eric, the next visit that I had, Abby told me that my payment had increased to $199/month. Also, whenever the nurse would draw blood or do a phlebotomy on me, she would poke hard and cause pain. She poked so hard one time that she drew blood and it leaked all over my arm, shirt, and the floor! She would poke in multiple places because she could not get the vain the first time supposedly and she is supposed to be a trained professional. One time, she poked me in three places on one arm and ended up sticking me in three places on the other arm in order to obtain the blood sample. I think this may have been on purpose as well because I complained. Don't go to this place as their products do not work and you will only waste your money! They are a business just like any other business and they are in it to make money...bottom line. My blood was always thick and they could never get my testosterone up to 700 to 800 like it was supposed to be. And when they did get it to 700 to 800, I did not feel any different. I was still tired, little energy, and felt like I was in a brain fog still. Also, they had me double dosing eventually which is taking the shot twice a week to supposedly increase energy. It didn't work! I still felt tired, little energy, and felt like I was in a brain fog. Since I stopped going to Limitless Male Fargo, I actually feel better. I am not constantly being stuck with needles and my arms are no longer bruised from constantly being stuck. I can actually work out with weights now as I was not able to before from constantly being poked in the arms with needles. TRT therapy is not cheap and to shell out $150 to $199/month is a lot of money for someone to cough up each month. Even after insurance kicked in, I was still paying $150/month and then after a year, they raised my monthly payment to $199/month. Your money would better be spent elsewhere on groceries, a car payment, a house payment, school, etc. Anything other than wasting money on Limitless Male products that do not work. And the staff was snotty after I complained about the provider that was nasty to me and that provider would not see me anymore. She had a total attitude problem. And whenever I complained about not getting the blunt pink draw needles, Eric and Abby changed their attitudes towards me and were no longer as nice anymore and that is whenever my payment supposedly needed to be increased per month. I do not recommend Limitless Male or TRT therapy to anyone. Instead, get plenty of rest like I have been doing, do cardio to increase your energy, and weight train. There is no substitute for good rest, cardio, and moderate weight training. If you do those three things at least three times per week, you will not need TRT therapy or Limitless Male and save yourself a ton of money! And, you won't be at risk of a heart attack or a stroke from the TRT therapy which from my experience was not helpful at all.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3Wn6c2rNyFIR-2Pgi6QHCgI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNiaXJ5TktnEAE
reviews.text: My test journey started off rough as I was just using a local hospital to handle my test issues. Unfortunately, they were not very receptive to what I needed at all, and my test levels got even worse. I took a chance on limitless and they actually listened to me and built me a plan to get my hormone health back. I have already lost 20 pounds in less than two months and I feel amazing. Definitely recommend them.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3Wn6c2rNyFIR-2Pgi6QHCgI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREaW9MYnR3RRAB
reviews.text: Superb experience! My medical providers are super knowledgeable, kind, approachable, and accessible! Portal makes getting my lab results easy. Prescriptions shipped to home or picked up without much difficulty. Nurses are capable and kind; my visits are always just long enough but never rushed. I should have done this years ago. Im 54 and lifting more weight at the gym than I did in my 30s, and have never looked better.
